description_long: This bungalow features a compact, single-story structure with a prominent hip roof in a dark color, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The front facade includes a central arched doorway flanked by two potted plants and a welcome mat, creating an inviting entrance. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding, painted in a dark gray tone, and the windows are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear views reveal additional windows, maintaining a consistent window style throughout the building. A small porch extends from the front, supported by a platform that matches the siding. The overall design is simple, functional, and well-suited for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, horizontal siding, and large rectangular windows. The front features an arched doorway, potted plants, and a small porch.
description_view_0: Rear view showing two large rectangular windows and the hip roof, with the porch platform visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched doorway, two potted plants, welcome mat, and a single large window to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a single large window and the extension of the porch platform to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with two large rectangular windows and the hip roof, no porch or entry features visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with single side windows
